description_long: This armchair features a deep, boxy silhouette with thick, padded arms and backrest, all upholstered in a glossy, dark brown leather material. The seat is wide and plush, with a slightly sunken appearance, suggesting ample cushioning for comfort. The exterior sides and back are characterized by a quilted, tufted pattern, giving the chair a luxurious and inviting look. The armrests are fully integrated into the frame, curving gently to meet the backrest at right angles. The chair stands on four short, sturdy legs made of dark wood or metal, providing a stable base. The overall design is modern yet classic, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or upscale public spaces.
description: A deep, boxy armchair with glossy dark brown leather upholstery, tufted sides and back, and thick padded arms. It features a wide, plush seat and short, sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, plush seat, thick padded arms, and glossy leather upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the deep armrest and the quilted, tufted pattern on the exterior.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full extent of the tufted, quilted leather back and the sturdy legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest and tufted exterior.
attribute_armrest_design: thick, padded and fully upholstered in leather, integrated with the frame
attribute_backrest_style: medium-high, straight, and fully upholstered with a quilted, tufted pattern
attribute_leg_type: short, blocky legs, likely wood or metal, dark finish
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted leather with a quilted pattern on sides and back
